nasb.text: But the high places were not removed from Israel; nevertheless Asa’s heart was blameless all his days.

esv.text: But the high places were not taken out of Israel. Nevertheless, the heart of Asa was wholly true all his days.

cnv.text: 只是邱壇還沒有從以色列中除掉，但亞撒的心一生都完全忠於耶和華。

ccb.text: 尽管他还没有把丘坛从以色列除去，但他一生对耶和华忠心。
